titleStmt.title: SII 34.173: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 173. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock outside the north prākāra wall of the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 6th year, Mīna, sudi 13, Maghā, Sunday = A.D. 1262, March 5.

The ūrāḷi-nāṭṭavar of Koḍukkayam, Kumaṭṭēri, Chātta-maṅgalam and Varagūr in Kuṟunagaināḍu a unit of Rājagembīṟa-vaḷanāḍu decided to contribute a sum of 350 paṇam for meeting the expenses of the Pūram festival in the month of Māsi in the temple of Tirumāṇikkamalaiuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOccaṭapaṉmar tirupuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī cundra
rapāṇṭiyatēvaṟku Iyāṇṭu 6 vatu mīṉa ṉāyaṟṟu purvapakṣa
ttu trayōdaśiyum makamum peṟṟa nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaināḷ Irācakem
pīravaḷanāṭṭu kuṟuṉakai nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭai
yār kōyiṟtāṉattāṟku Iṉṉāṭṭu koṭukkayam kumaṭṭēri cā
ttamaṅkalam vākūr Ūrāḷi nāṭṭavarōm kalveṭṭikkuṭutta
paricāvatu Iṉṉāḷ mutal pūrantīttamāka tirumācittirunāḷ ca
ntirātittavaraiyum Eḻuntaruḷuvikka kaṭavōmākavum Eḻuntaru
ḷuvikkumiṭattu Ittirunāḷukku tirunāḷoṉṟukku Uṭaṟkoṇṭa
paṭiorumā-3 100 5 10 Ippaṇa muṉṉūṟṟampatum koṇṭu tirunāḷ E
ḻuntaruḷuvikka kaṭavatākavum Ippaṇattukku Okka Ūr koṇṭu
nīkka kaṭavōmākavum koṇṭaṭuyaṉavum Ippaṇamuṉṉū
ṟṟampatu miṉṉāṭṭu muṉṉiṉṟāroruvar taṇṭi vayikāki vaca
mē kuṭukka kaṭavōmākavum Ippaṭi camatittu kalveṭṭikku
ṭuttōm Uṭaiyār tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭaiyār kō
yiṟ tāṉattārkku Ūrāḷi nāṭṭavarōm koṭukkayattu
ti cēriyil karuñcēntaṉ Eḻuttu kaṇapati Ariyāmuṭi Eḻuttu
kumaṭṭēril cēmaṉ Akauṉ Eḻuttu Oruppaṉ tēcamu Eḻuttu
Aṭutta pukki Eḻuttu malai nāṭu kōṉ Eḻuttu Arumaṉ
Eḻuttu veṭṭuñcempallavarayaṉ Eḻuttu vēta nāu
Eḻuttu tirunārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu kāvēri Eḻuttu Innāṭṭu
nāṭṭukkaṇakku nāyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
